# Screenshots

This folder holds product screenshots referenced by the manuals
(`docs/Quick-Start-With-Screenshots.md`, `docs/User-Manual.md`, and others). The images are
**generated by a capture script** — they are not hand-made or fabricated. This README explains the
set, the script, the target pages, and the current install blocker.

---

## Current status (honest)

**No screenshots have been generated on this host.** The capture script depends on **Node.js +
Playwright**, which are **not installed** here. The script detects this and exits cleanly (it prints
the enabling commands rather than failing), so the screenshot files referenced by the docs do not yet
exist. The docs are written so that the surrounding text describes what each screenshot would show —
the guides are complete without the images.

This is a documented blocker, not a defect: the platform itself has no Node dependency. Capturing
screenshots is a documentation step that runs against a **running app** using a headless browser.

---

## How the capture works

Script: `scripts/docs/capture-screenshots.ps1`

- **Read-only:** it navigates GET pages only. It never submits a form or changes data.
- It drives a **running** LocalAIFactory instance with headless Chromium (Playwright) at a
  1440×900 viewport and saves full-page PNGs into this folder.
- If Node/Playwright is absent it prints the install commands and exits 0 (the documented blocker
  above) — it does not fail the build.

### Enabling commands (on a machine with Node 18+)

```powershell
npm init -y
npm i -D playwright
npx playwright install chromium
# then, with the app running:
scripts/docs/capture-screenshots.ps1 -BaseUrl http://localhost:5000
```

---

## Target pages

The capture script targets these pages (route → file name). The manuals reference a 15-page target
set across the platform's navigable pages; the script currently captures the highest-value subset
below, and can be extended by adding entries to its `$pages` array.

| File | Route | Page |
|---|---|---|
| `01-home-dashboard.png` | `/` | Home / Dashboard |
| `03-readiness.png` | `/Readiness` | Readiness scorecard |
| `04-base-knowledge.png` | `/BaseKnowledge` | Base Knowledge browser |
| `06-projects.png` | `/Projects` | Projects list / overview |
| `09-graph-explorer.png` | `/Graph` | Explore Graph / impact |
| `11-benchmarks.png` | `/Benchmarks` | Benchmarks / validation harness |
| `13-audit.png` | `/Audit` | Audit Trail (admin) |
| `15-support-health.png` | `/Support` | Support / health dashboard |

The broader 15-page set the manuals describe also includes Chat, Knowledge, Business Rules, Approved
Code, Code Candidates, Import Project, Imports, Project Profiles, Knowledge Graph, Users & Access,
Models, Task Profiles, Agent Tasks, and Workspaces. Add any of these to the script's `$pages` array
to capture them. Admin-only pages (Users & Access, Audit Trail) require running the capture under an
Admin identity.

---

## Conventions

- Full-page PNG, 1440×900 viewport.
- File names are prefixed with a stable number so they sort in walkthrough order.
- Re-running the script overwrites existing images for the pages it reaches; pages it cannot reach
  are skipped (logged), not faked.
- **Never** hand-edit or synthesize a screenshot to imply a state the app did not produce.
